apps.name: Stock Manager
apps.tagline: Professional inventory management with real-time tracking.
apps.short_desc: Modern stock management for small and medium businesses: product catalog, stock movements, dashboard, alerts, CSV export and offline SQLite storage.
apps.long_desc:
Stock Manager is a modern inventory management application designed for small and medium-sized businesses.

Key features:
- Product creation, SKU, categories and photos
- Real-time inventory movement tracking
- Dashboard for product count, value and low-stock items
- Smart low-stock and critical-level alerts
- CSV export and reporting
- Local SQLite data storage
- Offline inventory management
- 5-language support: Turkish, English, French, German, Dutch
release_notes: Improved Android backup and restore compatibility for .sfbak files.
Added support for opening Stock Manager backup files directly from Android file managers.
Improved backup file picker behavior on mobile devices.

feature_details.title: Barcode and QR scanner
feature_details.description: Find products or add stock using the device camera, with manual entry still available when camera access is not granted.

feature_details.title: Stock movement timeline
feature_details.description: Entries, sales and updates are shown in chronological order so inventory changes stay transparent.

feature_details.title: Invoice and supplier tracking
feature_details.description: Attach invoice photos and supplier details to stock entries for cleaner accounting context.

feature_details.title: Secure offline storage
feature_details.description: Inventory data is stored on the device and core workflows continue without an internet connection.

privacy_points: May process account, business, product and transaction records for inventory workflows.
Camera permission is used for barcode and QR scanning.
Storage access may be used for product images and exported reports.
Internet access may support synchronization, updates, security and support.

apps.name: Arrow Escape
apps.tagline: A fast-paced arrow puzzle built around memory, focus and timing.
apps.short_desc: Follow arrows, remember fading directions, manage the timer and escape increasingly complex puzzle boards with boosters, missions and rewards.
apps.long_desc:
Arrow Escape is a fast-paced puzzle game where players follow arrows, test memory and find the right path before time runs out.

Key features:
- Easy to learn, hard to master arrow puzzle gameplay
- Fading arrow system that tests memory
- Time-based levels with increasing pressure
- Complex arrow maps and mistake limits
- Vision Cards, Time Freeze and hints
- Daily missions, streak rewards and coins
- Neon-purple visual style
- Reward-focused level progression
apps.tech_stack: Flutter / Game loop / Rewarded ads / In-app purchases
release_notes: Launched Arrow Escape on Google Play.
Added fading arrow gameplay, timed levels and core booster flow.
Published initial puzzle progression, missions and reward economy.

feature_details.title: Fading arrow memory challenge
feature_details.description: Players must remember directions after arrows fade, creating a sharper focus loop than a static puzzle board.

feature_details.title: Time pressure and mistake limits
feature_details.description: Levels build tension with timers and limited errors while keeping the rules easy to understand.

feature_details.title: Boosters and hints
feature_details.description: Vision Cards, Time Freeze and hints give players comeback tools without removing the puzzle challenge.

feature_details.title: Daily missions and rewards
feature_details.description: Coins, streak rewards and daily goals create a reason to return without overloading the core game.

privacy_points: No login, membership registration, cloud profile or Devovia-owned server account is required.
Game progress, coins, stars, boosters, missions, streaks and settings may be stored locally on the device.
Google AdMob may process advertising identifiers, device information, approximate location and ad interaction data.
Optional in-app purchases are processed by Google Play Billing under Google Play rules.

apps.name: Daily Hadith
apps.tagline: Daily spiritual guidance with a calm, premium interface.
apps.short_desc: Daily Hadith combines hadiths, prayer times, Qibla compass, smart tasbih, audio playback, visual cards and multi-language support.
apps.long_desc:
Daily Hadith helps users bring spiritual routines into daily life through a polished mobile interface.

Key features:
- Hadith and quote of the day
- Accurate prayer times and notifications
- Qibla compass
- Smart tasbih with haptic feedback
- Audio playback through text-to-speech
- Create and share visual cards
- Islamic calendar and holy days
- Multi-language support and premium ad-free option
apps.tech_stack: Flutter / Notifications / TTS / ML Kit translations
release_notes: Resolved prayer alarm scheduling edge cases.
Improved notification permission handling with system fallback.
Fixed data synchronization on app resume.

feature_details.title: Hadith and quote of the day
feature_details.description: A focused daily surface helps users read, reflect and return without cognitive overload.

feature_details.title: Prayer times and notifications
feature_details.description: The app supports daily rhythm with prayer timing, reminders and permission-aware notifications.

feature_details.title: Qibla compass and smart tasbih
feature_details.description: Core Islamic utility tools are placed inside the same calm, polished mobile experience.

feature_details.title: Visual cards and audio playback
feature_details.description: Users can listen, save and share content in formats that fit daily spiritual routines.

privacy_points: Location may be requested for prayer time calculation and Qibla direction, processed on-device.
Advertising providers such as Google AdMob and Unity Ads may process ad identifiers and ad interaction data.
Purchases are handled by Google Play or App Store; financial data is not collected by Devovia.
Language, theme, bookmarks, notification preferences and premium cache may be stored locally.

apps.name: TinySteps
apps.tagline: Simple habit tracking that actually works.
apps.short_desc: A clean habit tracker for daily habits, reminders, widgets, streaks, statistics, light/dark mode and premium productivity features.
apps.long_desc:
TinySteps helps users build daily habits, stay consistent and create routines that last.

Key features:
- Daily habits, specific days or weekly targets
- Smart habit reminders
- Home screen habit widget
- Streaks, completion rate and consistency stats
- Routine and productivity tracking
- Light and dark mode
- Free plan with up to 5 habits
- Premium unlimited habits, advanced stats, backup and export
apps.tech_stack: Flutter / Local storage / Widgets / Notification scheduling
release_notes: Improved app startup performance and reduced initial load work.
Optimized habit and log reads for faster lists and summaries.
Simplified settings and polished in-app text.

feature_details.title: Daily, weekly and custom habit targets
feature_details.description: Users can track simple daily routines or more flexible schedules without complex setup.

feature_details.title: Smart reminders
feature_details.description: Reminders keep habits visible at the right moment while premium users can set richer schedules.

feature_details.title: Widget-first completion
feature_details.description: Home screen check-offs reduce friction and make the habit loop feel immediate.

feature_details.title: Streaks and clear statistics
feature_details.description: Progress is shown through completion rate, consistency and streaks instead of noisy dashboards.

privacy_points: No account is required and habit data is stored locally on the device.
Habit names, schedules, reminders, logs, theme and settings preferences remain on-device.
Free users may see Google AdMob ads; purchases are processed by Google Play Billing.
Notifications are scheduled locally when enabled.
